entries.summary: HTML5 Standalone Build — all 5 phases completed successfully. Produced a 0.5MB single-file ClipSanitizer-web.html artifact that runs in browsers via file:// protocol with full sanitizer, clipboard, drag-drop, and docx support.
lessons_learned: Vite outputs the input HTML filename (index.web.html) not index.html — the copy script must match the actual output name, not the plan's assumption
Node.js warns about ES module detection in scripts/ when package.json lacks type:module — cosmetic but could be resolved by adding type:module
Pre_check_batch sast_scan returns 'fail' verdict with 0 findings on non-source files (HTML, CSS) — this is a false positive that should not block the pipeline
Gate status tracking requires explicit evidence file creation by reviewer/test_engineer agents — stale plan statuses from previous sessions can block scope declaration
